sources.title: Survival with osimertinib plus chemotherapy in EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC
supported_claims: FLAURA2 final analysis reported an OS benefit for osimertinib plus chemotherapy.

sources.title: FDA approval of lazertinib plus amivantamab-vmjw in EGFR-mutated NSCLC
supported_claims: FDA approved lazertinib plus amivantamab-vmjw for first-line EGFR exon19del/L858R NSCLC.

sources.title: FDA approval of osimertinib after chemoradiotherapy in unresectable stage III EGFR-mutated NSCLC
supported_claims: FDA approved osimertinib after platinum-based chemoradiotherapy for unresectable stage III EGFR exon19del/L858R NSCLC without progression.

sources.title: FDA approval of amivantamab-vmjw plus carboplatin and pemetrexed after EGFR TKI
supported_claims: FDA approved amivantamab-vmjw plus carboplatin and pemetrexed after progression on or after an EGFR TKI.

sources.title: Patritumab deruxtecan in EGFR-mutated NSCLC after EGFR TKI and platinum-based chemotherapy
supported_claims: HERTHENA-Lung01 reported activity of patritumab deruxtecan after EGFR TKI and platinum-based chemotherapy.

sources.title: Real-world outcomes after osimertinib and platinum-based chemotherapy
supported_claims: Real-world outcomes after osimertinib and platinum-based chemotherapy remain poor in reported US cohorts.

sources.title: ORCHARD osimertinib plus savolitinib in MET-amplified EGFR-mutated NSCLC after osimertinib
supported_claims: ORCHARD reported activity for osimertinib plus savolitinib in MET-amplified disease after first-line osimertinib.

sources.title: CNS efficacy of osimertinib with or without chemotherapy in EGFR-mutated advanced NSCLC
supported_claims: FLAURA2 included CNS efficacy analyses for osimertinib with or without chemotherapy.

sources.title: Cost-effectiveness of osimertinib after chemoradiotherapy in unresectable stage III EGFR-mutated NSCLC
supported_claims: Published economic modeling highlights value uncertainty and country-specific sensitivity for osimertinib after chemoradiotherapy.

sources.title: HERTHENA-Lung02
supported_claims: HERTHENA-Lung02 evaluates patritumab deruxtecan versus platinum-based chemotherapy after third-generation EGFR TKI.

sources.title: SAFFRON
supported_claims: SAFFRON evaluates savolitinib plus osimertinib in EGFR-mutated, MET-overexpressed/amplified NSCLC after osimertinib.

sources.title: ORCHARD
supported_claims: ORCHARD is a biomarker-directed platform study after first-line osimertinib.

claims.claim_text: FLAURA2 final analysis reported an OS benefit for osimertinib plus chemotherapy.
FDA approved lazertinib plus amivantamab-vmjw for first-line EGFR exon19del/L858R NSCLC.
FDA approved osimertinib after platinum-based chemoradiotherapy for unresectable stage III EGFR exon19del/L858R NSCLC without progression.
FDA approved amivantamab-vmjw plus carboplatin and pemetrexed after progression on or after an EGFR TKI.
HERTHENA-Lung01 reported activity of patritumab deruxtecan after EGFR TKI and platinum-based chemotherapy.
Real-world outcomes after osimertinib and platinum-based chemotherapy remain poor in reported US cohorts.
ORCHARD reported activity for osimertinib plus savolitinib in MET-amplified disease after first-line osimertinib.
claims.evidence_level: platform trial publication and registry record

claims.claim_text: A post-osimertinib molecular assignment platform is a strategic hypothesis for EGFR-mutated NSCLC.
claims.evidence_level: strategic hypothesis grounded in source-linked unmet need and biomarker-directed signals

claims.claim_text: A first-line risk-adapted intensification trial is a strategic hypothesis for high-risk EGFR-mutated NSCLC.
claims.evidence_level: strategic hypothesis grounded in multiple first-line regimen developments

claims.claim_text: A CNS-first endpoint strategy is a strategic hypothesis for EGFR-mutated NSCLC trial design.
claims.evidence_level: strategic hypothesis grounded in source-linked CNS efficacy analyses

claims.claim_text: Economics-oriented evidence generation should capture resource use, PRO, and access-sensitive endpoints.
claims.evidence_level: recommendation informed by published economic modeling and internal evidence-generation logic
